PROP-01b-partial3-inv-047.text: CowSwap order lifecycle: stale orders (pre-auction) must be replaced, not reused.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-047.assertion: forall order: order.createdAt < auctionStart => invalidate and create new order

locations.note: ORDER_MANAGER_ROLE can invalidate old orders via GPv2Settlement.invalidateOrder
auctionStart check at line 131-134 prevents validating orders from before auction restart; no explicit createdAt field check
